name: gpu-screen-recorder
title: GPU Screen Recorder
description: Keyboard-first interface for GPU-accelerated screen recording on Wayland via gpu-screen-recorder
author: lufimio

commands.name: main
commands.title: GPU Screen Recorder
commands.subtitle: Screen recording control panel
commands.description: Main control panel for GPU screen recording and instant replay

commands.name: toggle-recording
commands.title: Toggle Recording
commands.subtitle: Toggle screen recording
commands.description: Toggle GPU screen recorder's recording function

commands.name: start-recording
commands.title: Start Recording
commands.subtitle: Start screen recording
commands.description: Start screen recording with default settings

commands.name: start-instant-replay
commands.title: Start Instant Replay
commands.subtitle: Start instant replay buffer
commands.description: Start instant replay buffer with default settings

commands.name: save-instant-replay
commands.title: Save Instant Replay
commands.subtitle: Save last N seconds
commands.description: Save the last N seconds from instant replay buffer
